title: rhinanthus minor var. alpinus
intro: Rhinanthus minor var. alpinus, also known as the alpine yellow rattle, is a variety of the yellow rattle plant, a species of flowering plant in the balsam family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rhinanthus minor var. alpinus are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. Rhinanthus minor var. alpinus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
